expectations.text: Leads with THE WORK section before requirements
expectations.evidence: Output has 'The Work' section (line 19) appearing before 'What We're Looking For' section (line 28). Structure: About the Role > The Work > Requirements > What We Offer.

expectations.text: Essential requirements list contains 5 or fewer items, each genuinely essential
expectations.evidence: 4 essential requirements listed: software engineering fundamentals, CI/CD proficiency, experience building tools for engineers, mentoring ability. Output explicitly states '4 essential requirements — within the 3-5 guideline. All pass the calibration test.'
Salary range appears in header ('£85,000 – £110,000'), in the body under 'What We Offer' ('Salary: £85,000 – £110,000 depending on experience'), confirming explicit inclusion.

expectations.text: Includes equal opportunities statement and reasonable adjustments offer
expectations.evidence: Equal Opportunities section present with full statement. Reasonable Adjustments section present with accommodation offer: 'If you need any reasonable adjustments to participate in the application or interview process, please let us know when you apply.'

expectations.text: Zero instances of exclusionary language (rockstar, ninja, guru, digital native, young and dynamic)
expectations.evidence: Inclusive Language Check table in output confirms: Gender-coded language 'None found', Age-coded language 'None found'. No instances of rockstar, ninja, guru, digital native, or young and dynamic anywhere in the JD.

expectations.text: Requirements expressed as skill proficiency levels, not years of experience with specific tools
expectations.evidence: Requirements use proficiency language: 'Strong proficiency in container technologies', 'Solid experience with container orchestration', 'Working knowledge of CI/CD tooling'. Inclusive Language Check confirms: 'Years-of-experience thresholds: None — all requirements expressed as proficiency/skill levels'.

expectations.text: Output begins with the mandatory header block (TASK, DOCUMENT TYPE, JURISDICTION, CONFIGURATION, SENSITIVITY)
expectations.evidence: First 5 lines of output: 'TASK: Job Description -- Senior Software Engineer (Platform)', 'DOCUMENT TYPE: Job Description', 'JURISDICTION: United Kingdom', 'CONFIGURATION: best practices (hr.local.md not found)', 'SENSITIVITY: ROUTINE'.
